offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, scattered financial data causes late tax submissions. We automate data collection instead of manual data entry into tax software.
problem: Difficulty in accurately preparing tax returns due to scattered financial data.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on tax tools
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Share insights in Etsy seller forums and groups
try_it: Let users try data collection for 1-3 sales
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with a CTA
Produce a demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow saving common inputs as templates
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing sales data
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
